briefdescription.para: Initializes the providers set in the configuration and starts measuring.

parameterdescription.para: a handle to the running measurement.

simplesect.para: TIREX_SUCCESS on success or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Stops the measurement and deinitializes the data providers.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called exactly once for each measurement job.

parameterdescription.para: The handle of the running measurement that should be stopped.
a handle to the result tree of the measurement. Must be freed by the caller using tirexResultFree(tirexResult*)

simplesect.para: TIREX_SUCCESS on success or an error code.

detaileddescription.para: Perform no aggregation.
For each aggregation intervall, store the maximum value.
For each aggregation intervall, store the minimum value.
For each aggregation intervall, store the average value.

briefdescription.para: Represents different levels of verbosity.

detaileddescription.para: The enum values are sorted by verbosity. That is, for example, if logs should only be logged level INFO or higher, then level >= INFO can be used to check what should be logged.

briefdescription.para: Categorizes different classes of error.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieve the name of the operating system (EnvInfo).
Retrieve the version of the kernel (EnvInfo).

briefdescription.para: Measure the "real" (wall clock) time in milliseconds that elapsed between tirexStartTracking and tirexStopTracking (Measurement).
Measure the time in milliseconds that the program spend in user mode between tirexStartTracking and tirexStopTracking (Measurement).
Measure the time in milliseconds that the program spend in kernel mode between tirexStartTracking and tirexStopTracking (Measurement).
Boolean value (0 or 1) representing whether GPU measurements are supported or not.

detaileddescription.para: Timestamp when the tracking was started.
Timestamp when the tracking was started.

briefdescription.para: The "working directory" of the repository (i.e. the path at which the root of the repository's file tree is located). Empty, if the repository is bare.

If requested, a zip archive is created that contains all files inside the repository that are not ignored by the gitignore. The path to the archive is returned as the value for this measure. The archive is created in a temporary location and is automatically deleted when the result object is freed.

detaileddescription.para: Reports the version of the TIREx Tracker that was used to collect the metadata.
Reports the command that was used to spawn the tracked process.

briefdescription.para: Searches for devcontainer configuration files and reports their location.
The total number of supported measures.

detaileddescription.para: It can be assumed that every number in the range [0, TIREX_MEASURE_COUNT] is a valid enum value.

briefdescription.para: Represents an invalid measurement.
Identifiers for all available measurements.

detaileddescription.para: Different types (EnvInfo, Time Series, Measure)

briefdescription.para: Denotes a list type. TIREX_LIST itself is not a valid datatype but can be used to check if a type is an aggregate via int islist = (type & TIREX_LIST) != 0;.

detaileddescription.para: Note: Currently unused

briefdescription.para: Represents different levels of verbosity.

detaileddescription.para: The enum values are sorted by verbosity. That is, for example, if logs should only be logged level INFO or higher, then level >= INFO can be used to check what should be logged.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* tirexLogCallback) (tirexLogLevel level, const char *component, const char *message)
memberdef.name: tirexLogCallback

briefdescription.para: Points to a function that takes in a log level, component, and message which should be logged.

detaileddescription.para: The log callback can handle the call as it likes (including ignoring it for example because logging is set to a lower verbosity or turned of). The component may be used to identify, where the log is comming from.

briefdescription.para: Categorizes different classes of error.
Identifiers for all available measurements.

detaileddescription.para: Different types (EnvInfo, Time Series, Measure)

briefdescription.para: Holds a handle to an ongoing measurement task.

detaileddescription.para: Note: Currently unused

briefdescription.para: Holds a handle to the results of a measurement.

detaileddescription.para: The measurement result is structed as a tree of categories, subcategories and (at the leaves) values.

briefdescription.para: Holds a result entry, i.e., a key-value pair of a name (string) and a value (tirexResult).
Contains information about a data provider.

detaileddescription.para: Data providers are modules tasked with collecting associated metrics about the program.

briefdescription.para: Represents an invalid measurement configuration.

detaileddescription.para: The null configuration should be used as a sentinel value to mark the end of the configuration in tirexStartTracking.

briefdescription.para: Set a callback that should be used for all future logs.

detaileddescription.para: Per default, nothing is logged and passing NULL for callback disables logging.

parameterdescription.para: Points to a function that takes in a log level, component, and message which should be logged. Pass NULL to disable logging.

briefdescription.para: Set a callback that should be used in case the program needs to abort.

detaileddescription.para: Per default, abort() is used.

simplesect.para: TIREX_SUCCESS on success or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Returns the number of entries contained in the result set.

simplesect.para: TIREX_SUCCESS on success or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Deinitializes and frees the result pointed at by result.
Fetches the system information from the measures requested in measures.

simplesect.para: TIREX_SUCCESS on success or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Populates the given buffer with all available providers (or at most bufsize if buf is not large enugh) and returns the total number of available providers.

simplesect.para: The number of available data providers.
TIREX_SUCCESS on success or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Contains tirex tracker's external C API.
